sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current cursor is at col 15, and we already pressed UP once there
# Let me continue pressing UP to see the full shift cycle for position 0

# Current pink hash at col 15
seg = current_frame.segmentation
current_pink = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        if 50 <= min_r <= 57:
            current_pink[min_c] = n['hash']

print(f"Current pink at col 15: {current_pink[15]}")
print(f"Target for col 15 (top 22,45): b4edb3faf810133b")

# Press UP 3 more times to see the full cycle (total 4 UPs from initial)
# Then press DOWN 4 times to reset
for i in range(3):
    action(['UP'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
            b = n['boundary']
            min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
            min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
            if 50 <= min_r <= 57 and min_c == 15:
                print(f"After {i+2} UPs: {n['hash']}")

# Now press DOWN 4 times to reset
for i in range(4):
    action(['DOWN'])

# Verify reset
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        if 50 <= min_r <= 57 and min_c == 15:
            print(f"After reset: {n['hash']}")
            print(f"Initial was: a2774f59f95f9997")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
